understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, while staying within the per-attempt turn limit and avoiding losing tiles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn chooses MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a specified target tile to interact (e.g., remove breakable 'x' blocks). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), reach the goal '+', or die by landing on spikes (u/v). CLICK does not move the player and is used to open paths by removing breakables; UNDO reverts the last action. Each level allows 2 attempts and each attempt has a limited number of turns/steps; hitting spikes ends the attempt and restarts the level.
